title: Touch 4: Sales Proposal HITL Workflow
description: Walk through the complete Touch 4 Sales Proposal human-in-the-loop workflow: from transcript processing through field review, brief generation, asset creation, and final delivery.

steps.narration: Start by navigating to the Touch 4 Sales Proposal page for your deal. You'll see the transcript processing form where you can paste your meeting notes.
After submitting the transcript, AtlusDeck begins extracting key fields and generating content. The progress indicator shows the workflow is actively processing your input.
The AI has extracted structured fields from your transcript. Review customer context, business outcomes, constraints, stakeholders, timeline, and budget before proceeding.
After approving the extracted fields, AtlusDeck generates a complete sales brief with executive summary, solution pillars, and ROI framing. Review the brief before final approval.
Once the brief is approved, AtlusDeck assembles all three proposal artifacts: the presentation deck, talk track, and buyer FAQ document. Review each artifact before marking as ready.
All artifacts are complete and saved to Google Drive. You can access the proposal deck, talk track, and buyer FAQ directly from the deal page. The entire workflow took just minutes instead of days.
